exactly! i decided to try an E8 pollux as support awakener to see how he plays with some teams and i just found that he struggles more to setup for big damage turns than ghelot, but has no use for the bleed itself
he has no heals, no debuffs, sacred heart cant be duped, and no prepare and less bleed scaling even on an overexalt round
still useful and i think has potential to be nice since his cards dont compete with other ultra awakeners for leap or quesar, but eeee
he feels like a chorus that's missing a heal/shield mechanic

i actually think sacred heart would be better if it stacked alert + shield and sin marks instead of the low damage so you could deal damage while surviving big rounds with accumulated shield from playing his card, which is another huge problem i noticed.
he has big damage (slightly below potential other assault units) but he's high cost so you use all your arthi on his cards only, and delivers nothing other than damage or bleed, bleed that you have to survive a round for it to proc so in boss fights it heavily makes nuking with him reliant on having a low cost barrier unit like tawil six wing or salvador rouse in hand
dats rude hes trying his best<:Pity:1400771620989308998>

also his cleansing resets due to him being a cycling dps not rly a bursty one<:question2:1356053130336272414>  atleast thats how i see him, u play hearts force the draw of cleansing and continue his stacking with his huge bleed payoff(its tiny but can be huge sometimes?)

I would agree with everything you said. From my understanding, he feels like you need to just keep surviving and slowly keep chunking damage over and over. Fully bursting with him is much more difficult due to his damage numbers not being that high, and his scaling taking a while. Furthermore, you want to survive and just keep setting up "Chunk" turns, and have remaining Arithma to survive and kill the boss before you die. I don't know about the change to his "Sacred Heart" thou because he is a "Assault" Awakener. <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>

<@179235663160279040> If ya do, go for E1, then go on Pollux, is my recommendation, not Castor. Reasoning being that Pollux can stack Sin Marks as instantly. His higher Enlightenments E2 and E3, are very important, just like Castor E2 and E3. However, all of that is out the window if you DO NOT go Enlightenments. Personally, just like most players, I would go WoD because of how D-Tide works, so more WoDs are always welcomed. Furthermore, E1 makes Pollux stack Sin Marks faster, but just like every Dps Carry, the real change or powerboost is E2 and E3, so without E1, it won't significantly hinder him in anyway.

You could make a Cantena or Jenkin.
You could make a Salvador, Tawil, Kath, 24, Daffodil team, but with lower Enlightenments, they are harder to use/scale/burst.
